text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists but with arXiv ID 2312.12464, not 2309.00722 as cited. The authors (Sukriti Jaitly, Tanay Shah, et al.) match, but the cited arXiv ID is entirely wrong — 2309.00722 points to a paper on quasinormal modes of loop quantum black holes, making the reference metadata fabricated/incorrect.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.12464
